steps.title: Order the 7 percentages from the table
steps.content:
From the table, the seven states have percentages: 21.9%, 27.9%, 25.9%, 19.5%, 30.1%, 36.4%, 35.5%.

Arranged in increasing order: 19.5%, 21.9%, 25.9%, 27.9%, 30.1%, 35.5%, 36.4%.

steps.title: Find the median of the 7 states
steps.content: For 7 values, the median is the middle value — the 4th value in the ordered list: 27.9%.

steps.title: Calculate the difference from the 50-state median
steps.content:
The median for all 50 states is 26.95%.

$$\text{Difference} = 27.9\% - 26.95\% = 0.95\%$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
